sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 14.63 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.14)

statement.latex: What are the composition factors of non-soluble finite groups all of whose normalizers of Sylow subgroups are$2$-nilpotent, in particular, supersoluble? { V.\,S.\,Monakhov} Described (L.\,S.\,Kazarin, A.\,A.\,Volochkov, Mathematics in Yaroslavl' Univ.: Coll. of Surveys to 30-th Anniv. of Math. Fac., Yaroslavl', 2006, 243--255 (Russian)).

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
